claims.claim_text: This is the strongest current packet for testing whether repetitive-impact cohorts need a clearance-first or tau-first translational logic instead of a generic inflammatory one.
claims.allowed_language: Use cohort-language as suggestive context only, not as a locked endotype claim.
contradiction_notes: Tau and clearance signals can co-occur without proving directionality, and repetitive cohorts can still carry unresolved inflammatory pressure.
evidence_gaps: Direct cohort-level ties between clearance readouts, tau variants, and longitudinal function are still sparse.
